{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320171144DCAAD27C7EA3BB78561A"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7353421979536180005","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的写作风格很朴素，像作者在和你聊天一样，感觉很亲切。书里的故事也很有意思，让我了解到了不少历史上的趣事。作者对开国功臣命运的分析很到位，也让我联想到了现实生活中的一些人。总之，我觉得这是一本很不错的历史书，值得一读。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709683411,"group_id":"7244479546039208997","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4dxVd0APq1E0S0oTh/6c/Rqn2njbwShSePbNaaW9Hpu","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3741010420832169","user_name":"爱吃斋啡的高神明"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3741010420832169","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7244479546039208997","book_info":{"abstract":"揭秘中国古代历史上开国功臣们兔死狗烹的原因
【编辑推荐】
☆知乎盐选专栏上万热度作者！
☆长于通俗历史类写作，为你带来一场历史故事的盛宴！
☆故事为主、论述为辅，兼具趣味性与知识性！
☆拨开历史迷雾，探寻历朝历代的传奇故事与谜团真相！
【内容简介】
中国古代历史上一群开国功臣，却意外拥有惨死的共同命运。
商鞅被车裂、李斯被腰斩、蓝玉被扒皮……
究竟为何他们会走向这样的结局，
本书为你揭秘中国古代历朝开国功臣们的兔死狗烹。
他们都有同一个身份：帮助君王定鼎江山的开国功臣。
他们也都有同样的命运：死得很惨！
若论死法，商鞅第一个举手：我可是被车裂的！
李斯不服：我可是被腰斩的！
韩信不屑：你们这都算啥？我可是被装在布袋里让宫女拿竹签当作利器被活活戳死的！
蓝玉表示：你们这都小儿科，我可是一整张皮被完整扒下来的……
若要论他们死前的遗言，无不充满着悔恨。
李斯说：早知今日，何必当初，好怀念当年在上蔡老家和你们在郊外打猎的日子啊！
韩信说：悔不听当年蒯通的计谋啊！
刘文静说：古人说高鸟尽，良弓藏，看来此言不虚啊！
文种淡定地说：我就说嘛，以后的历史若是讲到忠臣的结局，必然会拿我的下场当比喻！
究竟为何他们会走向这样的结局，本书为你揭秘！
【作者简介】
沈贤亭：90初土生土长的上海人，业余历史爱好者，平日喜欢阎连科式的魔幻现实主义，也喜欢松本清张的社会派悬疑，所以文风更偏向于朴素无华现实风格，自己也曾尝试写过小说，散文随笔常见于《中国艺术报》等报刊，通俗历史类知乎盐选专栏上万热度。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/14f4d6d5a56e5cd5e544dea6c46f378d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"沈贤亭","author_id":"","book_id":"7244479546039208997","book_name":"拨开历史迷雾：开国功臣们的兔死狗烹","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#606898","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"1105人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":241,"name":"历史文化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241&name=历史文化&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7244482272433278010","read_count":"156","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"91793"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"38","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/14f4d6d5a56e5cd5e544dea6c46f378d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181904&x-signature=5FF2CcledMA8RLOgDh%2FYqjU22lo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320171144DCAAD27C7EA3BB78561A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7320,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":40},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7244479546039208997","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","sco
